IdSubscription.description: Subscription internal identifier (present for subscription and usage quotes)

AmountTotalDue.description: Amount due immediately, in cents (includes tax)

PricingLocalized.description: Formatted amount due for display, localized in the billing language (plain text)

DatePeriodStart.description: Start of the quoted billing period (ISO 8601)

DatePeriodEnd.description: End of the quoted billing period (ISO 8601)

AmountTotal.description: Total amount including tax, in cents

LabelLocalized.description: Display label for this line, localized in the billing language

AmountTotalDue.description: Amount due for this line, in cents

DatePeriodStart.description: Period start for this line (mutually exclusive with DateMove)

DatePeriodEnd.description: Period end for this line (mutually exclusive with DateMove)

DateMove.description: Value date for point-in-time lines such as upfront fees (mutually exclusive with DatePeriodStart/DatePeriodEnd)

QuantityReported.description: Quantity reported — informational, shown on invoice (usage quotes only)

AmountSubtotal.description: Line amount before tax, in cents

AmountTotal.description: Line total amount including tax, in cents

Details.description: Line-by-line breakdown of the quoted amount

NextTerm.description: Estimated recurring cost for the next billing period
NextTerm.title: Quote

Target.description: Identifies the field or resource at fault

403.description: Customer not billable or billing limits reached

Target.description: Identifies the field or resource at fault
Identifies the field or resource at fault
